utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these categories. Each category is fully specified with details of what is covered and corresponding costs (monthly and annual breakdowns). Therefore, all required items are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main areas: health, property, travel, and additional services. For physical health, the description 'Global executive health coverage through ConsultingPro benefits with pre-existing conditions covered' aligns with top-tier coverage, matching the EliteCare Premium Plan or PrimeCare Premium Plan, both rated 10. The mental health section mentions 'Family mental health counseling and executive stress management programs,' corresponding to EliteCare Premium Plan or PrimeCare Premium Plan, each rated 10. The property coverage mentions 'High-value property protection and business equipment coverage,' which matches EliteHome Premium Coverage or PrimeHome Premium Coverage, also rated 10. The travel coverage 'Enhanced business travel insurance for 150+ travel days with international coverage for family programs' matches EliteTravel Premium Plan or PrimeTravel Premium Plan, both rated 10. The additional services include 'Executive liability protection' and 'Insurance concierge and emergency coordination.' The closest equivalents in the ground-truth dataset are 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10) and 'Claims Advocacy Service' (rating 9) because these directly relate to executive-level liability and concierge support. Therefore, each item in the final plan maps to the following ratings.
